problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
